rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.1041, which governs teacher probationary contract hearings. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 21.1041. HEARING UNDER PROBATIONARY CONTRACT. A teacher is entitled to:
_note: Rule text concerns teacher employment hearings; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
